summary: Testing complete for UI overhaul and longest_chain feature. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All screens and flows working correctly. Fixed critical bug: longest_chain was not being updated in game/submit endpoint.

issues: Console warnings about deprecated shadow* and textShadow* props (React Native Web deprecation, cosmetic only, not affecting functionality)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing: test_ui_1776458771, test_ach_*, test_game_*, tu_*, tr_*, tp_*, ts_*, tt_*, ta_*, tlc_*, tlb_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major UI overhaul complete. All 9 achievements working (including new games_10). longest_chain field added to user model and correctly updated in game/submit. System keyboard (TextInput) working correctly. Design matches requirements: navy-to-green gradient, white tiles with navy text, green accents, circular timer. Previous Turkish keyboard removed. All navigation flows working.

auth.login_returns_existing: ✅ Returns same user on repeat login

user_profile.get_user: ✅ Returns user profile with all fields including longest_chain

game_flow.validate_valid: ✅ Accepts valid Turkish word with correct starting letter
game_flow.validate_wrong_letter: ✅ Rejects word not starting with required letter
game_flow.validate_duplicate: ✅ Rejects duplicate word in same session
game_flow.submit_updates_stats: ✅ Updates best_score, total_score, games_played, words_total, max_combo, longest_chain
game_flow.submit_updates_longest_chain: ✅ Correctly updates longest_chain (max of previous and current)
game_flow.submit_assigns_title: ✅ Assigns correct title based on score

leaderboard.weekly: ✅ Returns weekly rankings sorted by score
leaderboard.monthly: ✅ Returns monthly rankings sorted by score

backend_tests.achievements: ✅ Returns 9 achievements (first_word, chain_5, chain_10, chain_20, score_100, score_200, score_500, combo_5, games_10) and 6 titles metadata

login_screen.elements: ✅ Tile-based KELIME ZINCIRI title, username input, green submit button (GİRİŞ YAP), hint text all present
login_screen.submission: ✅ Login API call successful, navigates to home

home_screen.elements: ✅ Title tiles (KELIME ZINCIRI), username display, OYNA (green), GÜNLÜK CHALLENGE (orange), navigation pills all present
home_screen.testIDs: ✅ home-screen, home-username, giant-start-button, daily-challenge-button, home-logout-button, home-leaderboard-button, home-achievements-button, home-stats-button

game_screen.elements: ✅ Circular green timer, score pill with star, previous word as white tiles with green last letter, system keyboard TextInput, green check submit button, exit button, ZINCIR counter all present
game_screen.timer: ✅ Timer counting down (28s visible in screenshot)
game_screen.testIDs: ✅ game-screen, game-score, game-prev-word, game-word-input, game-submit-button, game-exit-button

game_over_screen.elements: ✅ Final score display, stats, action buttons all present
game_over_screen.navigation: ✅ Home button, play again button, leaderboard button all working

achievements_screen.elements: ✅ Back button, count pill (0/9), 9 achievement cards with lock icons
achievements_screen.achievements: ✅ All 9 achievements present: first_word, chain_5, chain_10, chain_20, score_100, score_200, score_500, combo_5, games_10
achievements_screen.testIDs: ✅ achievements-screen, achievements-back, achievements-count, ach-first_word, ach-chain_5, ach-chain_10, ach-chain_20, ach-score_100, ach-score_200, ach-score_500, ach-combo_5, ach-games_10

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: longest_chain field was not being updated in submit_score endpoint
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added new_longest_chain = max(user.get('longest_chain', 0), req.words_found) and included it in user update
